name: Ultimate Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>究極融合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アルティメット・フュージョン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that mentions "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" or "Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon" as material, by shuffling the materials mentioned on it from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck, then, you can destroy face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" and "Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon" used from the field as material. You can only activate 1 "Ultimate Fusion" per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that mentions "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" or "Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon" as material, by shuffling the materials mentioned on it from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck, then, you can destroy face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" and "Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon" used from the field as material. You can only activate 1 "Ultimate Fusion" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
